scenarios_verified.details: Greenfield flow + profile deposition. writeProfileFromArtifacts tested in writer.test.ts TEST-018/019/020/021. L0/L1/L3 written from greenfield artifacts. L2 written only when l2_enabled=true (TEST-019). Profile write is the sole addition to greenfield flow (INV-001 confirmed by PROP-003 + build.md 'Profile Write Step (ALL modes)' section which explicitly states it is the only modification). greenfield artifacts continue to go to specs/ (REQ-012-AC-4 confirmed by command structure). mergeDomainModel tested in TEST-025/026 for incremental merge.

Add feature to existing project with profile. Mode detection (TEST-036/037/038) detects returning_project. resolveFlowMode (TEST-041) returns feature mode on user choice. Profile read context injected in discover.md/spec.md feature mode branches. detectConflicts (TEST-044/045/046/047) compares feature requirements against L2 philosophy and constraints with L3 domain model collision detection. Regression guard generation specified in discover.md Layer 3 feature mode branch. Impact audit specified in critic.md feature mode section. Build worktrees branch from HEAD (build.md feature mode worktree strategy). Artifacts written to specs/features/feat-xxx/ (discover.md artifact output path section). Profile update after build fires for both modes.

First-time onboarding. detectMode (TEST-037) returns first_time_onboarding when code exists but no profile. resolveFlowMode (TEST-040) sets onboardingRequired=true. scanCodebase (TEST-030/031/035) extracts L0/L1/L3 partial data. discover.md mode detection block triggers scan and presents greenfield/feature choice. Design principle 'Context must not overgeneralize' explicitly captured in discover/index.json preventing single feature philosophy from being treated as project philosophy.

module_results.name: discover-feature-mode
module_results.notes: Prompt-level implementation in commands/discover.md. All mode detection branches, Layer 1 skip, Layer 2 inheritance, philosophy skip, UI Taste adherence, regression guard generation, and artifact output path sections verified by code review.

module_results.name: spec-feature-mode
module_results.notes: Prompt-level implementation in commands/spec.md. Code awareness section verified.

module_results.name: build-feature-mode
module_results.notes: Prompt-level implementation in commands/build.md. Feature mode input paths, worktree strategy, profile write step (both modes), artifact output paths verified.

invariant_verification.statement: Greenfield mode behavior remains identical to current, with sole addition of profile writing after build
invariant_verification.evidence: PROP-003 (writer.test.ts) proves writeProfileFromArtifacts does not modify specs/ contents. build.md explicitly states 'This step fires for both greenfield and feature mode builds. It is the only modification to the greenfield flow.' spec.md states 'This step applies only when mode=feature. In greenfield mode, skip this step entirely (INV-001).' critic.md states 'In greenfield mode, skip impact audit entirely (INV-001).'

invariant_verification.statement: Profile L2 shall never block or alter system behavior when disabled
invariant_verification.evidence: TEST-005 proves writeLayer('l2') throws L2_DISABLED without writing. TEST-020 proves writeProfileFromArtifacts skips l2 entirely when l2_enabled=false — no file created. PROP-001 proves l0/l1/l3 writes succeed regardless of l2_enabled state. TEST-050 and PROP-007 prove detectConflicts operates correctly with null/undefined L2 (falls back to L0/L1 structural checks).

invariant_verification.statement: Feature-scoped artifacts reference but never copy project-level profile content
invariant_verification.evidence: discover.md artifact output section specifies 'specs/features/feat-{featureSlug}/discover.json' as output path — a separate file that reads profile by path. spec MOD-006 function 'featureArtifactOutput' documents 'References profile by path.' writeProfileFromArtifacts always writes to rootDir/.nopilot/profile/ (storage.ts profileDir function) regardless of artifactsDir — profile content is never embedded in feature artifacts.

invariant_verification.statement: Profile write operations shall never modify existing specs/ artifacts
invariant_verification.evidence: PROP-003 (writer.test.ts): reads specs/ directory listing before and after writeProfileFromArtifacts, asserts directory contents are identical. storage.ts writeLayer writes exclusively to rootDir/.nopilot/profile/{layer}.json — no path exists that could touch specs/.

invariant_verification.statement: Code scanning bounded by configurable thresholds and parallelized via sub-agents
invariant_verification.evidence: TEST-031 proves parallelized=false when fileCount < threshold (500 default). TEST-030 proves parallelized=true when fileCount > custom threshold (5). scanner.ts scanCodebase uses config.scanThresholdFiles ?? 500 as threshold. readConfig (TEST-012) proves default scanThresholdFiles=500. TEST-013 proves partial config merges (scan threshold inherits default when not set). Parallelization flag is surfaced in ScanResult for caller to act on.

global_coherence_check.detail: Intent: selected_direction was 'Profile-as-Memory with intent/structure separation — auto-captures architectural intent from NoPilot workflow outputs.' Build output delivers exactly this: 8 TypeScript modules + 5 JSON schemas + command-level prompt additions that catch existing workflow outputs (discover.json, spec.json, build_report.json, decisions.json) into a persistent .nopilot/profile/ store. No drift detected. Complexity: 8 modules map 1:1 to the 8 spec modules (MOD-001 through MOD-008). No speculative abstractions added. Scanner, writer, and conflict-detector are thin utilities with clear single responsibilities. Constraints: (1) TypeScript + NoPilot existing architecture — confirmed, all new code is TypeScript under src/profile/, no new runtimes. (2) No new runtime or external service dependencies — confirmed, only Node.js built-ins (fs, path, child_process) + Ajv (already a dev dep). (3) No git-tracked profile files — confirmed, ensureGitignore() adds .nopilot/ to .gitignore, and storage.ts writes exclusively to .nopilot/profile/ which is gitignored. (4) CLI only (Claude Code slash commands) — confirmed, all feature mode logic is prompt-level additions to existing .md command files.
